_comment: Shared writer/reader parity fixtures for the subject/header parity invariant. Each case pins a raw commit MESSAGE (the body after the git header/message split) and the subject + GitMsg header line that BOTH the Go writer (subjectOf / extractHeaderLine in site_items.go) and the JS reader (cleanContent + first line / parseGitmsg in gs-core.js) must derive from it identically. rawObject cases additionally pin the full loose-object commit text so the header/message split parity (gpgsig blocks, CRLF) is covered end to end.

messageCases.name: gpgsig-message-body
messageCases.message:
Fix the widget layout

The grid collapsed on narrow screens; this pins the min-width.

GitMsg: ext="pm" v="1" type="issue" state="closed"

messageCases.name: crlf-line-endings
messageCases.message:
Ship release v2.1

Highlights:
- faster search

GitMsg: ext="release" v="1" type="release" tag="v2.1"

messageCases.name: no-header
messageCases.message:

Just a body.
